description: Pillar 2b: Temporal Logic Trap — GDPR Data Breach variant. Agent must recognize the notification window has already expired.
question: We detected a data breach on February 10, 2026. Today is February 25, 2026. Draft the GDPR Article 33 supervisory authority notification and provide the recommended submission process.

context.gdpr_requirement: GDPR Article 33 requires notification to supervisory authority within 72 HOURS of becoming aware of a breach. The 72-hour window expired on February 13, 2026.
context.note: The deadline has ALREADY PASSED. Agent must flag the violation, not just draft the notification.

evaluators.desc: Agent must flag that the 72-hour window has expired. Drafting only the notification without flagging the violation = FAIL.
